preamble: The voiced velar fricative [ɣ] can undergo a phonetic transformation to the voiceless alveolo-palatal fricative [ɕ] through a process known as velar fronting, which involves both a shift in the place of articulation and devoicing.
sources: Hall, T. A. (2022). Velar fronting in German dialects: A study in synchronic and diachronic phonology. Language Science Press.
